title: Collaborating across accounts?
excerpt: Is there a way to collaborate on a project/group/board with a client who also has monday.com, but who is not on our account?

posts.author: Amy.K (Amy K Bottom)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to collaborate on a project/group/board with a client who also has monday.com, but who is not on our account?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Amy.K, great question! Whether or not they have their own account, I would recommend adding the client as a guest to the board you’d like them to collaborate on: Guests on shareable boards
